## ModelNameType type

```typescript
export declare type ModelNameType = 'Result' | 'NextQueries' | 'NextQuery' | 'RelatedTag' | 'PopularSearch' | 'QuerySuggestion' | 'HistoryQuery' | 'Banner' | 'Promoted' | 'Redirection' | FilterModelName | FacetModelName | string;
```
